g.ns139:text:
\begin{align*}
&\textbf{Coordenadas cil\xedndricas:} \\[8pt]
\vec{r} \quad &= \quad \rho\,\hat{e}_\rho + z\,\hat{e}_z \\[10pt]
\dot{\vec{r}} \quad &= \quad \dot{\rho}\,\hat{e}_\rho + \rho\dot{\phi}\,\hat{e}_\phi + \dot{z}\,\hat{e}_z \\[10pt]
\ddot{\vec{r}} \quad &= \quad (\ddot{\rho} - \rho\dot{\phi}^2)\,\hat{e}_\rho + (\rho\ddot{\phi} + 2\dot{\rho}\dot{\phi})\,\hat{e}_\phi + \ddot{z}\,\hat{e}_z
\end{align*}

\[ (\hat{e}_z \text{ es constante, mientras que } \hat{e}_\rho \text{ y } \hat{e}_\phi \text{ giran con } \phi) \]
